extractedFrom: Source A (stockLib1563): AMS2CustomDriversUtil library/vehicles/ams2_vehicles_1.5.6.3.xml (github.com/FitzHastings/AMS2CustomDriversUtil, stock library for AMS2 1.5.6.3 - may be stale vs current game). Source B (observedInUserFiles): livery_name attributes of <driver> elements in every *.xml/*.orig under Y:/SteamLibrary/steamapps/common/Automobilista 2/UserData/CustomAIDrivers (community NAMeS files incl. "Alternate NAMeS" subfolder); these may be stock OR skinpack names. Class key = xml_name (Source A) or filename base (Source B); variantOf flags filename bases that extend/duplicate a known class. Extracted 2026-07-02.
